S.PHON: КҺa savan ti КҰamaq kivu, "a КҰa kauЙӯidan a ЕӢadan nu kinakaКҰaЙӯisijan a sivЙҷКҰikan ta ЕӢadan mavan na ЙүaКҺЙҷmЙҷЙүЙҷm, aza ku ЕӢadan sikaqЙҷКҺaЕӢan tu anЙҷma mЙҷn nu zukan, КҺanЙҷma mЙҷn a Йүumaan, niЙүЙҷn a kinapataЙӯЙҷvanan i kaКҰawan. puzaЕӢaЙӯan tu makaja maКҺЙҷЙӯiav azukan a КҰawКҰaw kipakim ta su kiniЕӢadaЕӢan."
S.FORM: lja savan ti camaq kivu, "a tja kaulidan a ngadan nu kinakacalisiyan a sivecikan ta ngadan mavan na djaljemedjem, aza ku ngadan sikaqeljangan tu anema men nu zukan, ljanema men a djumaan, nidjen a kinapatalevanan i kacawan. puzangalan tu makaya maljeliav azukan a cawcaw kipakim ta su kiningadangan."
S.PHON: КҺa savan ti КҰamaq kivu, "a КҰa kauЙӯidan a ЕӢadan nu kinakaКҰaЙӯisijan a sivЙҷКҰikan ta ЕӢadan mavan na ЙүaКҺЙҷmЙҷЙүЙҷm, aza ku ЕӢadan sikaqЙҷКҺaЕӢan tu anЙҷma mЙҷn nu zukan, КҺanЙҷma mЙҷn a Йүumaan, niЙүЙҷn a kinapataЙӯЙҷvanan i kaКҰawan. puzaЕӢaЙӯan tu makaja maКҺЙҷЙӯiav azukan a КҰawКҰaw kipakim ta su kiniЕӢadaЕӢan."
S.TRANSL: camaq kivu said, \The names written in indigenous languages are our true names. My name represents our ethnic group

S.FORM: ta tiyav ti aken kati vuvu avavayan vayke a ma icipa ta papaveliyanan, na kemacu ti vuvu avavayan ta liyav a namakakayzuazua a sinitalem a lacing, utanga sikipualan ta na kacalisiyan a kakanen sipakan tua mapuljat.

S.TRANSL: Yesterday, I went to the market with my grandmother to set up a stall. My grandmother brought a lot of vegetables that she grew herself and also prepared indigenous cuisine for everyone.

S.FORM: na djengelay a mapuljat ta ni vuvu a papaveliyanan, a kamangulj ata luni maljeleav a cawcaw veneli, maljeleav a cawcaw mangedjez a keman ta sinanljaceng ni madju.
S.PHON: na ЙүЙҷЕӢЙҷЙӯaj a mapuКҺat ta ni vuvu a papavЙҷЙӯijanan, a kamaЕӢuКҺ ata Йӯuni maКҺЙҷЙӯЙҷav a КҰawКҰaw vЙҷnЙҷЙӯi, maКҺЙҷЙӯЙҷav a КҰawКҰaw maЕӢЙҷЙүЙҷz a kЙҷman ta sinanКҺaКҰЙҷЕӢ ni maЙүu.

S.TRANSL: Everyone loved my grandmotherвҖҷs stall. Many people bought the chilis and African eggplants, and many people came to taste the dishes she cooked.

S.FORM: sanguwa alavac a kines ni madju a lukuce kata djuadjuay a kinsa. izuanan a siljatu ta vavuy pinasazuan ta daykung kata tjana, aza saluman masiljudje ta maljeliyav a kaljakalja. mangdjez a mapuljat sa madjuljul ita niamen a papaveliyan.

S.TRANSL: The ferns and sticky rice she cooked were delicious, as well as the braised pork with maqaw pepper and wild boar meat. The flavors attracted many customers, and everyone lined up at our stall.
